---
pagetitle: "DigiKat — Prikaz i analiza katoličke tematike u digitalnom medijskom prostoru"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="font-family: 'Source Sans 3', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1b1d21; line-height: 1.55;">

<!-- ============ HERO ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 72px 40px 64px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 26px;">
      <span style="width: 7px; height: 7px; background: #0f4c5c; border-radius: 50%;"></span>
      Računalna društvena znanost · 2021–2025
    </div>
    <h1 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 52px; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.015em; margin: 0; max-width: 19ch; color: #14181d; text-wrap: balance;">
      Prikaz i analiza katoličke tematike u digitalnom medijskom prostoru
    </h1>
    <p style="font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.5; color: #4f535a; margin: 22px 0 0; max-width: 60ch;">
      Mapping Catholic themes across the Croatian digital media space — an empirical, open-science study of how religion is discussed online across portals, social platforms and forums.
    </p>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; margin-top: 38px;">
      <a href="baza.html" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 6px;">Istraži podatke / Explore the data</a>
      <a href="about.html" style="display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #14181d; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #cfccc2;">Metodologija / Methods</a>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 40px; margin-top: 56px; padding-top: 30px; border-top: 1px solid #e4e2da; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;">
      <div><div style="font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; color: #14181d; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">610&#8201;000</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #6b6f76; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-top: 4px;">objava / posts</div></div>
      <div><div style="font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; color: #14181d; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">620</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #6b6f76; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-top: 4px;">varijabli / variables</div></div>
      <div><div style="font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; color: #14181d; letter-spacing: -0.01em;">6</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #6b6f76; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-top: 4px;">platformi / platforms</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ STATS BAND ============ -->
<section style="background: #0f1419; color: #eef0f0;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 64px 40px;">
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 0;">
      <div style="padding: 4px 36px 4px 0; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 44px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #fff;">610&#8201;000</div>
        <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #aeb4b8; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">medijskih objava<br><span style="color: #7c8388;">media posts collected</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 36px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 44px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #fff;">620</div>
        <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #aeb4b8; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">kodiranih varijabli<br><span style="color: #7c8388;">coded variables</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 36px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 44px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #fff;">5</div>
        <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #aeb4b8; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">godina · 2021–2025<br><span style="color: #7c8388;">years of coverage</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding: 4px 0 4px 36px;">
        <div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 44px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #fff;">6</div>
        <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #aeb4b8; margin-top: 12px; line-height: 1.4;">platformi i izvora<br><span style="color: #7c8388;">platforms &amp; sources</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-top: 36px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #aeb4b8;">
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">Web portali</span>
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">YouTube</span>
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">Facebook</span>
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">Twitter / X</span>
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">Reddit</span>
      <span style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 4px; padding: 5px 10px;">Forumi</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ FRAMEWORK ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 01 — Analitički okvir / Framework</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #14181d;">Četveroslojni analitički okvir</h2>
    <p style="color: #5a5e65; max-width: 64ch; margin: 0 0 44px;">Four-layer analytical framework — the corpus is read from raw data upward to interpreted discourse, each layer feeding the next.</p>
    <div style="position: relative; padding-left: 56px;">
      <div style="position: absolute; left: 19px; top: 22px; bottom: 22px; width: 2px; background: linear-gradient(#0f4c5c, #cfddE1);"></div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">01</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Korpus i podaci</h3><div style="font-size: 14px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 10px;">Corpus &amp; Data</div><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Prikupljanje, deduplikacija, identifikacija jezika i čišćenje 610.000 objava s portala, društvenih platformi i foruma.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">ingest</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">dedupe</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">lang-id</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">02</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Akteri</h3><div style="font-size: 14px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 10px;">Actors</div><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Tko objavljuje — računi i mediji klasificiraju se u četiri arhetipa aktera koji oblikuju kruženje tema.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">classify</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">archetypes</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2c6f7e; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">03</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Teme</h3><div style="font-size: 14px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 10px;">Themes</div><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Sadržaj se pridružuje u 16 tematskih kategorija putem nadziranog učenja i tematskog modeliranja.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">supervised</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">topic-model</span></div>
      </div>
      <div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px;">
        <div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #5a949f; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">04</div>
        <div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Diskurs</h3><div style="font-size: 14px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 10px;">Discourse</div><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Okvir, sentiment i mrežna struktura analiziraju se i interpretiraju kako bi se opisalo oblikovanje katoličkog diskursa online.</p></div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">framing</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">sentiment</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">networks</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ ACTOR ARCHETYPES ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 02 — Akteri / Actor archetypes</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #14181d;">Četiri arhetipa aktera</h2>
    <p style="color: #5a5e65; max-width: 64ch; margin: 0 0 40px;">Four actor archetypes — tipologija digitalnog utjecaja prema dosegu i angažmanu (medijan-podjela izvora); udjeli označavaju postotak aktera u svakom kvadrantu.</p>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 18px;">
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; border-top: 3px solid #0f4c5c;"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26" style="margin-bottom: 16px;"><rect x="3" y="3" width="20" height="20" rx="2" fill="#0f4c5c"></rect></svg><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 19px; margin: 0 0 2px; color: #14181d;">Divovi</h3><div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 14px;">Giants · visok doseg + angažman</div><p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #4f535a; line-height: 1.5;">Istovremeno visok doseg i visok angažman — apsolutni lideri ekosustava koji spajaju široku vidljivost s aktivnom publikom.</p><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #0f4c5c; border-top: 1px solid #eee9df; padding-top: 12px;">45% aktera</div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; border-top: 3px solid #0f4c5c;"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26" style="margin-bottom: 16px;"><polygon points="13,3 23,22 3,22" fill="#0f4c5c"></polygon></svg><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 19px; margin: 0 0 2px; color: #14181d;">Graditelji zajednica</h3><div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 14px;">Community Builders · nizak doseg, visok angažman</div><p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #4f535a; line-height: 1.5;">Niži doseg uz iznimno visok angažman — grade duboke odnose s vjernom publikom u specifičnim nišama.</p><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #0f4c5c; border-top: 1px solid #eee9df; padding-top: 12px;">7% aktera</div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; border-top: 3px solid #0f4c5c;"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26" style="margin-bottom: 16px;"><rect x="13" y="2" width="15" height="15" transform="rotate(45 13 2)" fill="#0f4c5c"></rect></svg><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 19px; margin: 0 0 2px; color: #14181d;">Megafoni</h3><div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 14px;">Megaphones · visok doseg, nizak angažman</div><p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #4f535a; line-height: 1.5;">Visok doseg uz nizak angažman — sadržaj vidi široka publika, ali ne potiče nužno aktivnu raspravu.</p><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #0f4c5c; border-top: 1px solid #eee9df; padding-top: 12px;">5% aktera</div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; border-top: 3px solid #0f4c5c;"><svg width="26" height="26" viewBox="0 0 26 26" style="margin-bottom: 16px;"><circle cx="13" cy="13" r="10" fill="#0f4c5c"></circle></svg><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 19px; margin: 0 0 2px; color: #14181d;">Specijalizirani akteri</h3><div style="font-size: 13.5px; color: #8a8e95; margin-bottom: 14px;">Specialists · niži doseg + angažman</div><p style="margin: 0 0 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #4f535a; line-height: 1.5;">Umjeren do niži doseg i angažman, s fokusom na specifičnu, manju publiku te ograničene tematske ili geografske niše.</p><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; color: #0f4c5c; border-top: 1px solid #eee9df; padding-top: 12px;">43% aktera</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ ISTRAŽIVAČKA PITANJA ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 03 — Istraživačka pitanja / Research questions</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 40px; color: #14181d;">Pet istraživačkih pitanja</h2>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 18px;">
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q1</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kako se katolička tematika prikazuje i kako se o njoj raspravlja u digitalnom medijskom prostoru?</p></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q2</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kakve su veze između katoličkih tema i drugih društvenih i političkih pitanja?</p></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q3</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Koji su akteri i institucije najistaknutiji u tim raspravama?</p></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q4</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kako se narativi i sentiment mijenjaju ovisno o aktualnim događajima?</p></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px; grid-column: 1 / -1;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q5</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 80ch;">Kakva je mrežna dinamika između različitih platformi i medija koji obrađuju ove teme?</p></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ 16 THEMATIC CATEGORIES ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 04 — Teme / Thematic categories</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 8px; color: #14181d;">Šesnaest tematskih kategorija</h2>
    <p style="color: #5a5e65; max-width: 64ch; margin: 0 0 40px;">16 thematic categories — svaka nosi svoju kategorijsku boju, dosljednu kroz tablice, kartice i grafikone.</p>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 12px;">
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #b5462f; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T01</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">39.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Duhovnost i liturgija</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Spirituality &amp; liturgy</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #cf8324; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T02</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">21.0%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Crkveno upravljanje i struktura</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Church governance</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #a98a1f; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T03</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">10.8%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Povijest i nacionalni identitet</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">History &amp; national identity</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #6e8c3a; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T04</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">8.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Politika i odnos s državom</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Politics &amp; the state</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #2f8f6b; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T05</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">8.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Bioetika i kulturni ratovi</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Bioethics &amp; culture wars</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #1f97a4; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T06</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">4.8%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Mediji, umjetnost i kultura</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Media, arts &amp; culture</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #2f73b8; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T07</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">2.7%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Pape i Vatikan</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Popes &amp; the Vatican</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #3f4fa0; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T08</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">2.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Karitas i socijalna pravda</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Charity &amp; social justice</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #6e54a6; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T09</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">1.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Teologija i doktrina</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Theology &amp; doctrine</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #9b4d9e; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T10</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.6%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Crkvene financije i imovina</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Church finances</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #c0468a; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T11</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.6%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Digitalna evangelizacija i mladi</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Digital evangelization</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #b23a52; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T12</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.3%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Odnos s drugim religijama</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Interfaith relations</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #8a6240; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T13</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.2%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Znanost i vjera</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Science &amp; faith</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #5e7488; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T14</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Globalna crkva i misije</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Global church &amp; missions</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #4c9c5e; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T15</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.1%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Zlostavljanje i kriza povjerenja</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Abuse &amp; crisis of trust</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px;"><span style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;"><span style="width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 3px; background: #c2702a; flex: none;"></span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #9a9ea6;">T16</span><span style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0f4c5c; margin-left: auto;">0.0%</span></span><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 14.5px; color: #14181d;">Unutarcrkveni prijepori i ideologije</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">Intra-church disputes</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ TEAM ============ -->
<section style="border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e2da;">
  <div style="max-width: 1180px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px;">
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f4c5c; margin-bottom: 12px;"><span style="width: 18px; height: 1px; background: #0f4c5c;"></span> 05 — Tim / Team</div>
    <h2 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 32px; line-height: 1.12; margin: 0 0 36px; color: #14181d;">Istraživački tim</h2>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px;">
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LŠ</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">doc. dr. sc. Luka Šikić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Voditelj projekta</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">AS</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Andreja Sršen</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">FHS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Irena Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">EFZG · Statistika</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LC</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Lana Ciboci Perša</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">PP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Petra Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IU</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">doc. dr. sc. Ivan Uldrijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnik</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">SL</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">dr. sc. Suzana Lipar Obrovac</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Odnosi s javnošću</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">HK</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Hana Kilijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">VN</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Veronika Novoselec</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Povijest</div></div></div>
      <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">MT</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Matea Topić Crnoja</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</div>
```
